4:T57a,(function(){var PARAM='__pd_reload';var KEY='privatedao-next-asset-recovery:'+(window.location.pathname||'/');function nextAsset(url){return typeof url==='string'&&url.indexOf('/_next/static/')!==-1;}function once(){try{if(window.sessionStorage.getItem(KEY)==='1'){return false;}window.sessionStorage.setItem(KEY,'1');return true;}catch(_){return true;}}function hardReload(){if(!once()){return;}var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.set(PARAM,String(Date.now()));window.location.replace(url.toString());}function maybeRecover(value){var message='';if(typeof value==='string'){message=value;}else if(value&&typeof value.message==='string'){message=value.message;}else if(value&&typeof value.reason==='string'){message=value.reason;}if(message.indexOf('ChunkLoadError')!==-1||message.indexOf('Loading CSS chunk')!==-1||message.indexOf('Failed to fetch dynamically imported module')!==-1){hardReload();}}window.addEventListener('error',function(event){var target=event.target;if(target&&nextAsset(target.src||target.href)){hardReload();}},true);window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection',function(event){maybeRecover(event.reason);});if(window.location.search.indexOf(PARAM+'=')!==-1){window.addEventListener('load',function(){var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.delete(PARAM);window.history.replaceState(window.history.state,'',url.toString());},{once:true});}})();0:{"P":null,"c":["","viewer","wallet-runtime",""],"q":"","i":false,"f":[[["",{"children":["viewer",{"children":[["slug","wallet-runtime","c",null],{"children":["__PAGE__",{}]}]}]},"$undefined","$undefined",16],[["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","link","0",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/02zo295tzj_7w.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","link","1",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/12wk4.kub2_30.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0og9v~0.wbgel.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0c3rgjc-0fe3r.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0f6kvf~_~fcr7.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/01v-109x2_k5o.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0i.l9589uvx0j.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-5",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/07ch6ku1wly-d.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-6",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/127esg9z7tiwn.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-7",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0j4pbljnny6-v.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]],["$","html",null,{"lang":"en","className":"space_grotesk_d7b50fc5-module__qeW00a__variable for real wallet-based review and operator use on Devnet, but wallet compatibility is treated as a runtime property that must be observable rather than assumed."}]}],["$","$1","block-2",{"children":["$","h2","h2-9",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Supported Runtime Surface"}]}],["$","$1","block-3",{"children":["$","p","p-12",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"The current browser surface detects and works with injected Solana wallet providers such as:"}]}],["$","$1","block-4",{"children":["$","ul","l-20",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-20-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Phantom"}],["$","li","l-20-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Solflare"}],["$","li","l-20-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Backpack"}],["$","li","l-20-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Glow"}],["$","li","l-20-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"compatible injected providers exposed through `window.solana`"}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-5",{"children":["$","h2","h2-23",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Why This Matters"}]}],["$","$1","block-6",{"children":["$","p","p-26",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"For a governance product, wallet behavior is part of the security surface."}]}],["$","$1","block-7",{"children":["$","p","p-28",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"If provider detection, signing, or transaction broadcast paths are brittle, reviewers will correctly treat the product as operationally weak even if the protocol logic is solid."}]}],["$","$1","block-8",{"children":["$","h2","h2-32",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Current Browser-Side Protections"}]}],["$","$1","block-9",{"children":["$","p","p-35",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"The current frontend hardening includes:"}]}],["$","$1","block-10",{"children":["$","ul","l-49",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-49-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"provider-specific detection and fallback resolution"}],["$","li","l-49-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"connection-path fallback across `connect`, `request`, and `enable`"}],["$","li","l-49-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"wallet public-key extraction across multiple provider response shapes"}],["$","li","l-49-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"delayed public-key readiness polling after connection so injected providers have time to expose the selected account"}],["$","li","l-49-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"transaction-path fallback across:"}],["$","li","l-49-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`sendTransaction`"}],["$","li","l-49-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`signAndSendTransaction`"}],["$","li","l-49-7",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`signTransaction`"}],["$","li","l-49-8",{"className":"list-disc","children":"runtime session rehydration"}],["$","li","l-49-9",{"className":"list-disc","children":"disconnect and account-change handling"}],["$","li","l-49-10",{"className":"list-disc","children":"interactive diagnostics for provider and RPC
